cards.name: Brew
cards.text: Apply 1 Weak. Stir a random Potion into The Cauldron.
cards.note: Brew (starter): apply Weak, then stir a RANDOM belt potion into The Cauldron (+2 Strength / +3 Heal to its stats; the potion is consumed).

cards.name: Defend
cards.text: Gain 5 Block.

cards.name: Extract Essence
cards.text: Deal 8 damage. On unblocked damage, extract a Potion.
cards.note: ExtractEssence: deal damage; on unblocked damage, create a random potion whose rarity matches the encounter tier — Common in normal fights, Uncommon vs elites, Rare vs bosses.

cards.name: Strike
cards.text: Deal 6 damage.
cards.note: The only difference between the starting Strike cards are portrait, attack vfx, and color.

cards.name: Bag of Teeth
cards.text: Deal 1 damage 6 times.

cards.name: Bewitching Grin
cards.text: ALL enemies gain 2 Weak.

cards.name: Bind in Blood
cards.text: Lose 3 HP. Apply 3 Hex.

cards.name: Broom Strike
cards.text: Deal 15 damage. The next Power you play this turn costs 0.

cards.name: Call the Pack
cards.text: Deal 6 damage. Shuffle 2 Gnash into your Draw Pile.

cards.name: Chromatic Claws
cards.text: Deal 8 damage. Discard a random Potion, then create a random Potion.
cards.note: Chromatic Claws: an Attack that scales with how many potions are in your belt right now.

cards.name: Fertilize
cards.text: Gain 5 Brambles. Upgrade 1 random card in your Hand.
cards.note: Fertilize (renamed from Serrated Bones): gain Brambles and upgrade random card(s) in your hand.

cards.name: Forbidden Magic
cards.text: Deal 20 damage. Gain 2 Weak.

cards.name: Herbal Brew
cards.text: Create a utility Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Lavender and Sage
cards.text: Draw 1 card. Add 2 Vigor to The Cauldron.

cards.name: Moondrop Tea
cards.text: Gain 8 Block. Remove a random Debuff.

cards.name: Pact of Agony
cards.text: Lose 3 HP. Add 2 Wound into your Discard Pile. ALL enemies gain 3 Weak.

cards.name: Spines
cards.text: Gain 7 Block. Gain 3 Brambles.

cards.name: Stampede
cards.text: Deal 8 damage for each of your Familiars.

cards.name: Steal Bones
cards.text: Deal 6 damage. Add 5 Block to The Cauldron.

cards.name: Stony Brew
cards.text: Create a defensive Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Vexing Thwack
cards.text: Deal 8 damage. Apply 1 Hex.

cards.name: Weathered Witch Hat
cards.text: Gain 10 Block. The next Skill you play costs 1.

cards.name: Wicked Brew
cards.text: Create an offensive Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Woe and Whimsy
cards.text: Gain 5 Vigor. Gain 5 Block.

cards.name: Ambush!
cards.text: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. Create a random Familiar card.
cards.note: Exhausts; applies a random familiar power with no cosmetic pet.

cards.name: Bear Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Bear Familiar.

cards.name: Bottle Wall
cards.text: Gain 7 Block. Create a Fortifier potion.

cards.name: Bramble Shield
cards.text: Gain 10 Block. Gain 5 Brambles.

cards.name: Brambleburst
cards.text: Deal 6 damage for each Bramble, then lose all Brambles.
cards.note: Hits once per Bramble; does nothing if you have no Brambles.

cards.name: Cat Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Cat Familiar.
cards.note: Summons a cosmetic cat pet alongside the familiar power.

cards.name: Circle of Rot
cards.text: You and your allies gain 10 Block and 2 Weak. Apply 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only. Co-op rot ritual (MP-only): you and every ally hunker down (Block) but soak up the rot (Weak), while all enemies choke on it too.

cards.name: Cloak of Moonlight
cards.text: Whenever you create a card or Potion, gain 3 Block.

cards.name: Consume Youth
cards.text: Deal 20 damage. Deals double damage to enemies above half HP.

cards.name: Creeping Vines
cards.text: Gain 7 Brambles X times.
cards.note: Spend X energy to pile Brambles on yourself, 7 at a time, X times — a fast way to stack a big Bramble count.

cards.name: Distill
cards.text: Upgrade {Potions:diff()} random Potions.
cards.note: Distill (renamed from Brew): upgrade a random potion in the player's belt to a higher-rarity one sharing its traits (see <see cref="PotionUpgrade" />).

cards.name: Double, Double
cards.text: Deal 3 damage twice. Give a random card in your Draw Pile Replay {Replay}.

cards.name: Feast With Wolves
cards.text: Deal 9 damage. Draw until you draw an Attack card.

cards.name: Find Familiar
cards.text: Add 1 Familiar power from your Draw Pile or Discard Pile into your Hand.
cards.note: Tutor: choose a familiar summon Power card (an <see cref="IFamiliarSummon" />) from your draw or discard pile and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Grind Down
cards.text: Exhaust a card. Turn it into a Potion.
cards.note: Grind Down: Exhaust a card from your hand and grind it into a potion.

cards.name: Herbal Remedy
cards.text: Destroy all of your potions. Draw 1 and gain 1 for each.

cards.name: Hexblast
cards.text: Detonate all debuffs on the enemy. Deal 10 damage for each debuff removed.

cards.name: Light the Candle
cards.text: Upgrade 2 random cards in your Hand. Create a Vial of Smoke.
cards.note: Light the Candle: upgrade random cards in your hand (via <c>CardCmd.Upgrade</c> so any on-upgrade listeners fire), then create a Vial of Smoke.

cards.name: Nettles
cards.text: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Deals 1 additional damage for each Bramble.
cards.note: Nettles: an AoE Attack that scales with your Brambles.

cards.name: Owl Familiar
cards.text: Summon an Owl Familiar.
cards.note: Summons a cosmetic owl pet alongside the familiar power.

cards.name: Pact of Fury
cards.text: Gain 5 Weak. Other allies gain 4 Strength.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only.

cards.name: Pillage
cards.text: Deal 9 damage. Draw a card for each of your Familiars.

cards.name: Prices Paid
cards.text: Lose 1 HP. Deal 6 damage. Create a Slicing Brew.

cards.name: Refuse Pile
cards.text: Gain 11 Block. Add 2 Rats into both your Draw Pile and Discard Pile.

cards.name: Ritual Sacrifice
cards.text: Sacrifice a Familiar. Gain 25 Block. Draw 3 cards.
cards.note: Only gains Block if a Familiar was actually sacrificed.

cards.name: Roomy Satchel
cards.text: Gain {Slots:diff()} potion slots until the end of combat.
cards.note: Roomy Satchel: gain potion slots for this combat only.

cards.name: Rotting Roots
cards.text: At the start of your turn, ALL enemies lose 5 HP and you gain 1 HP.

cards.name: Salt and Ash
cards.text: Gain 8 Block. Gain {BonusBlock:diff()} more Block if you have a debuff.

cards.name: Share the Brew
cards.text: You and your allies each gain a random Potion.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only.

cards.name: Stuck in a Bush
cards.text: Gain 8 Brambles. Gain 2 Vulnerable.

cards.name: Wax and Wane
cards.text: Gain 9 Block. Apply 1 Hex.

cards.name: Wild Growth
cards.text: Double your Brambles.
cards.note: Exhausts (until upgraded).

cards.name: Wolf Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Wolf Familiar.

cards.name: A Little Sip
cards.text: Whenever you use a Potion, heal 1 HP.

cards.name: Bonfire
cards.text: When possible, spend 5 Brambles to play cards instead of Energy.

cards.name: Bottle Barrage
cards.text: Deal 10 damage for each Potion created this combat.{InCombat: (Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
cards.note: Hurl the whole belt: one 10-damage hit per potion you've brewed this combat.

cards.name: Bottomless Cauldron
cards.text: Whenever you use a Potion, create a Noxious Brew.

cards.name: Broken Pact
cards.text: Sacrifice a Familiar. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.

cards.name: Chimera Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Chimera Familiar.

cards.name: Crow Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Crow Familiar.

cards.name: Cursed Spellbook
cards.text: At the start of your turn, draw 1 fewer card and gain 1 extra Energy.

cards.name: Dance Around the Cauldron
cards.text: Whenever you play a Skill this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Embrace the Wilds
cards.text: Summon {Familiars:diff()} random Familiars. Draw {DrawReduction} fewer cards at the start of each turn.
cards.note: Embrace the Wilds: summon a burst of random familiars at the cost of drawing fewer cards each turn for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Extract Life
cards.text: Deal 12 damage. A random card in your Hand gains Replay {Replay:diff()} and Exhaust.
cards.note: Extract Life: an Attack that also enchants a random card in your hand with Replay and Exhaust — one big extra payoff this combat, then gone.

cards.name: Gather Herbs
cards.text: Copy the next Potion you create.

cards.name: Hedge Prison
cards.text: Your Brambles no longer wear off.

cards.name: Hemlock
cards.text: Your Brambles apply 1 Hex when they retaliate.

cards.name: Hidden in Smoke
cards.text: At the start of your turn, create a Vial of Smoke potion.
cards.note: Exhausts.

cards.name: Lich Powder
cards.text: Add 1 Intangible to The Cauldron.

cards.name: Mulch
cards.text: Exhaust your Hand. Deal 5 damage and gain 4 Brambles for each card Exhausted.

cards.name: Pact of Beasts
cards.text: Put all Familiar powers from your Draw Pile and Discard Pile into your Hand.

cards.name: Pocket Rats
cards.text: Add 3 Rats into your Hand.
cards.note: Exhausts.

cards.name: Rat Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Rat Familiar.
cards.note: Exhausts.

cards.name: Rattling Bottles
cards.text: Deal 15 damage. Fill your empty potion slots with Rocks.
cards.note: Exhausts.

cards.name: Repurpose
cards.text: At the start of your turn, draw a random card from your Discard Pile, then discard a card.

cards.name: Soul Knot
cards.text: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, apply it to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Unstable Reaction
cards.text: Destroy all of your potions. Deal 20 damage to ALL enemies for each.

cards.name: Wicker Form
cards.text: If you would create a card or Potion, instead create a Rake.

cards.name: Witchcraft
cards.text: Pour all of your Potions into The Cauldron.
cards.note: Witchcraft (renamed from Cackle): pour the whole belt into the Cauldron.

cards.name: Claw Eyes
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Apply 1 Weak.

cards.name: Curiosity
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Put a card from your Hand on top of your Draw Pile.

cards.name: Ferocity
cards.text: Deal 7 damage twice.
cards.note: Cat familiar token.

cards.name: Gnash
cards.text: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals 5 additional damage for each Gnash played this combat.
cards.note: Wolf familiar token.

cards.name: Hibernate
cards.text: Gain 15 Block. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
cards.note: Bear familiar token; exhausts.

cards.name: Knowledge
cards.text: Upgrade a card in your Hand for the rest of combat.
cards.note: Owl familiar token: forge your hand.

cards.name: Mutilate
cards.text: Deal 22 damage. Ignores Block.
cards.note: Bear familiar token: heavy hit that ignores Block.

cards.name: Nibble
cards.text: Deal 1 damage. Hits once for each Rat card played this combat, including itself.
cards.note: Rat familiar token.

cards.name: Plague
cards.text: Apply 1 Hex to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Rat familiar token.

cards.name: Rake
cards.text: Deal 6 damage. Gain 4 Brambles. Draw 1 card.
cards.note: Rake: the token every card/potion creation becomes while Wicker Form is active.

cards.name: Rats
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
cards.note: Pocket Rats token; exhausts.

cards.name: Scout Weakness
cards.text: Apply 2 Vulnerable.

cards.name: Shiny!
cards.text: Gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.

cards.name: Wisdom
cards.text: Draw 2 cards, then discard a card.
cards.note: Owl familiar token.

cards.name: Catalyst
cards.text: Duplicate Potions you create.
cards.note: Catalyst: the Wicken's unique Ancient card (granted by Dusty Tome — any <c>CardRarity.Ancient</c> card in the pool outside the transcendence map qualifies).

cards.name: Infuse
cards.text: Choose and Exhaust 2 cards. Stir them into The Cauldron.
cards.note: Infuse: the Ancient (transcended) form of Brew — choose and Exhaust cards from your hand, stirring each into The Cauldron as if it were a potion (+2 Strength / +3 Heal apiece).

cards.name: Wormy
cards.text: Lose 1 HP. Gain 1 Weak.
cards.note: Wormy: a playable nuisance status (from Wormy Apple).
